note: FOUNDER_PACKET.json is legacy factory intake name; human master is PSSOT.md
proof_question: Can LifeOS reliably turn real conversations into useful action?
phase0_finding: 60-70 percent of 7-day MVP already exists in production spine
scope: 7-day MVP proof loop: conversation paste, evidence-linked extract, user approval, commitments table, today/overdue surface
Consolidate commitment API split-brain onto commitment-tracker.js
Document C2 embed path without Command Center rebuild
success_criteria: At least three extractions with Evidence First bundle
Why does LifeOS think this exists is answerable on every approved row
No calendar write, Sherry share, or autonomous send in 7-day execute
failure_criteria: Blueprint builds commitment system from scratch ignoring salvage
Any approved commitment lacks evidence bundle
Builder execute runs before operator billing gate clears
non_goals: Full therapy, mediation, or relationship analysis
C2 as brain or blueprint authority
Silent legacy reuse without salvage rows

escalation.rule: BPB returns BLOCKED_RETURN_TO_BPB on ambiguity; do not escalate strategic scope to founder mid-blueprint

founder_attention_budget.note: Blueprint authoring is machine work; founder needed for billing setup and post-execute proof loop validation

founder_decision_log.decision: C2 long-term destination; Mirror/Today for v1
Private by default for all users
No execute until debit card billing aligned

core_purpose: Capture approved conversations, extract commitments with evidence, surface today/overdue — consent-driven, not surveillance

c2_surface_strategy.v1_implementation: reuse Mirror and/or Today; document C2 embed path; no standalone dashboard

governance.builder_path: BPB BLUEPRINT.json → factory write_file_exact → optional Railway builder
